name: RectangleMovement
shortDescription: Move objects in a rectangular pattern.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Move objects in a rectangular pattern.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: RectangleMovement

eventsFunctions.name: TeleportToCorner
eventsFunctions.description: Teleport the object to a corner of the movement rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: Perimeter
eventsFunctions.description: Return the perimeter of the movement rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: LoopDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Return the time the object takes to go through the whole rectangle (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: HorizontalEdgeDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Return the time the object takes to go through a horizontal edge (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: VerticalEdgeDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Return the time the object takes to go through a vertical edge (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: Width
eventsFunctions.description: Return the rectangle width.

eventsFunctions.name: Height
eventsFunctions.description: Return the rectangle height.

eventsFunctions.name: Left
eventsFunctions.description: Return the left bound of the movement.

eventsFunctions.name: Top
eventsFunctions.description: Return the top bound of the movement.

eventsFunctions.name: Right
eventsFunctions.description: Return the right bound of the movement.

eventsFunctions.name: Bottom
eventsFunctions.description: Return the bottom bound of the movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Change the left bound of the rectangular movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetTop
eventsFunctions.description: Change the top bound of the rectangular movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetRight
eventsFunctions.description: Change the right bound of the rectangular movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetBottom
eventsFunctions.description: Change the bottom bound of the rectangular movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetHorizontalEdgeDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the time the object takes to go through a horizontal edge (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: SetVerticalEdgeDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the time the object takes to go through a vertical edge (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: SetClockwise
eventsFunctions.description: Change the direction to clockwise or counter-clockwise.

eventsFunctions.name: SetEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the easing function of the movement.

eventsFunctions.name: ToogleClockwise
eventsFunctions.description: Toggle the direction to clockwise or counter-clockwise.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMovingClockwise
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is moving clockwise.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMovingLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is moving to the left.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMovingUp
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is moving up.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMovingRight
eventsFunctions.description: Object is moving to the right.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMovingDown
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is moving down.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOnLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Object is on the left side of the rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOnTop
eventsFunctions.description: Object is on the top side of the rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOnRight
eventsFunctions.description: Object is on the right side of the rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: IsOnBottom
eventsFunctions.description: Object is on the bottom side of the rectangle.

eventsFunctions.name: MoveAlongBorderOfObject
eventsFunctions.fullName: Update rectangular movement to follow the border of an object
eventsFunctions.description: Update rectangular movement to follow the border of an object. Run once, or every time the center object moves.

eventsFunctions.name: MoveToNearestCorner
eventsFunctions.fullName: Move to the nearest corner of the center object
eventsFunctions.description: Move to the nearest corner of the center object.

description:
Move objects in a rectangular pattern with easing functions from the Tween extension.

It can be used for:

- Moveable platforms
- Enemy movement patterns
- Moving along the border of another object (inside, center, outside)

The platformer example uses this extension ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://platformer)).

This game shows how to make objects move around the border of another object ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://moving-saw-platformer)).

This example can be used to test different settings ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://rectangular-movement)).
